name: Thessaloniki Port Authority Societe Anonyme
summary: Thessaloniki Port Authority Societe Anonyme engages in the management and exploitation of the port of Thessaloniki located in Greece. It operates through four segments: Container Terminal, Conventional Cargo, Passenger Traffic, and Utilization of Facilities. The company provides conventional cargo handling services, including loading and unloading services, and SILO services; and containerized cargo handling services. It also offers ships anchoring, mooring, berthing, and other services; and services to passengers on coastal and cruise ships and in transit. In addition, it offers spaces for commercial and other uses; and operates car parking stations. The company primarily serves industries, shipping agents, container transportation companies, and freight transport companies. Thessaloniki Port Authority Societe Anonyme was established in 1999 and is based in Thessaloniki, Greece.
